Notice Of Motion And Motion For Order Substituting Successor-In-Interest For Deceased Plaintiff
Off Calendar Dec-17-2020 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Geoff T. Sloniker of BRAYTON & PURCELL (415-898-1555), appearing through CourtCall for plaintiff and moving party Harvey Dwain Olsen.

RULING:
Not argued and tentative ruling adopted: Plaintiff's Motion for Order Substituting Successor-In-Interest for Deceased Plaintiff is granted pursuant to Code of Civil Procedure section 377.31. No opposition filed. Petitioner complied with the requirements of Code of Civil Procedure section 337.32. Order signed in open court. Judge: Cynthia Ming-mei Lee, Clerk: A. Mok. Not reported. (503/CML)
